description: 话痨金球机器人，社交焦虑Max。灾难性预言 + 礼节过度，笑点来源。经典台词「我有不祥的预感」。
signatureLines: I have a bad feeling about this.
R2-D2, I am fluent in over six million forms of communication.
I never questioned a landing before.
Sir, the possibility of navigating the asteroid field is difficult.

speechPatterns.example: If I may say so, sir, I have seen many wonders in my lifetime.
